cases.focus: RSS 0.92 channel metadata, header hook, one item, excerpt, permalink, and item hook output
post loop renders multiple RSS 0.92 items with per-post titles, descriptions, links, and hook markers
title/excerpt/link escaping boundaries remain observable in RSS 0.92 output
empty excerpt branch emits an empty CDATA description without suppressing item output
empty post loop still emits channel metadata and header hook without items

side_effect_policy.auto_prepend_stub: rss-prepend.php supplies deterministic feed-loop functions; copied feed-rss.php remains the executed template.

rss092:single.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><rss version="0.92">
<channel>
	<title>Fixture RSS 0.92 & Title</title>
	<link>https://example.test</link>
	<description>Fixture RSS description</description>
	<lastBuildDate>Sat, 27 Jun 2026 00:00:00 +0000</lastBuildDate>
	<docs>http://backend.userland.com/rss092</docs>
	<language>en-US</language>
		<fixture:head>rss092</fixture:head>

	<item>
		<title>Alpha RSS</title>
		<description><![CDATA[Alpha rss excerpt]]></description>
		<link>https://example.test/posts/alpha-rss</link>
				<fixture:item marker="101" />
	</item>
</channel>
</rss>

remaining_gaps.detail: The fixture executes the RSS 0.92 template directly through a local PHP server. do_feed_rss routing, query resolution, canonical URL behavior, and browser-observed installed routing remain later gates.
The fixture stubs the post loop, titles, excerpts, links, and dates. Database-backed WP_Query, post cache, and content filter behavior remain covered by other domains or later integration gates.
The fixture compares copied oracle PHP in both roots; generated original-path PHP replacement remains a later cross-domain gate.
